tasks.label: Deploy to M7 (remoteproc)
tasks.command: scp -O -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o HostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa -o PubkeyAcceptedAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa debug/evkmimx8mp_rpmsg_lite_str_echo_rtos_remote_cm7.elf root@192.168.7.2:/lib/firmware/m7-app.elf && ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o HostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa -o PubkeyAcceptedAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa root@192.168.7.2 'echo stop > /sys/class/remoteproc/remoteproc0/state 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; echo -n m7-app.elf > /sys/class/remoteproc/remoteproc0/firmware; echo start > /sys/class/remoteproc/remoteproc0/state; echo M7 state: $(cat /sys/class/remoteproc/remoteproc0/state)'
